functional_requirements.requirement: Provide a personalized profile for each user
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: Login – provides a personalized profile for each user, to ensure security.

functional_requirements.requirement: Allow users to personalize their account and change their password
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: Profile changes – each user can personalize their account, and change their password.

functional_requirements.requirement: Enable clients to post project requests with requirements for BPO organizations
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: Post project request – clients post their request with requirements for BPO organizations to choose from.

functional_requirements.requirement: Allow BPO organizations to search and respond to client project requests
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: Search project requests – BPO organizations can search and respond to the requests.

functional_requirements.requirement: Enable transfer of documents required by BPO organizations through the system
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: Upload source documents – the documents required by the BPO organization can be transferred through the system, and the receiver can download them.

functional_requirements.requirement: Provide progress updates to clients on work being done
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: Check progress – clients should be constantly updated with the progress of the work.

functional_requirements.requirement: Allow clients to check their product and quote modifications
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: Quality check and testing – the clients can check their product and quote any modifications.

functional_requirements.requirement: Enable BPO organizations to upload their products/services for further procedure
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: Upload product/service – BPO organization should upload their product/service for the further procedure (payment, shipment, etc.).

functional_requirements.requirement: Facilitate payment from clients to BPO organizations at the end of agreements
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: Payment – clients should pay the BPO organization at the end of their agreement.

functional_requirements.requirement: Enable shipment of products/services to clients
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: Shipment – the product/service should be delivered to the clients.

functional_requirements.requirement: Allow clients to rate the service provided by BPO organizations
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: Rating – the clients can rate the service provided by the BPO organization

prompt:
You are a requirements engineer.
Extract functional software requirements from the source text.

Return ONLY valid JSON with this schema:
{
  "functional_requirements": [
    {
      "requirement": "string",
      "evidence_quote": "short exact quote from source text"
    }
  ]
}

Rules:
1. Include only system capabilities/behaviors.
2. Exclude background context, impact statements, problem motivation, and pure business goals.
3. Keep each requirement atomic and clear.
4. Preserve original meaning. Do not invent functionality.
5. If uncertain, keep the item but keep evidence_quote explicit.

Source text:
<<<
Login – provides a personalized profile for each user, to ensure security. Profile changes – each user
can personalize their account, and change their password. Post project request – clients post their
request with requirements for BPO organizations to choose from. Search project requests – BPO
organizations can search and respond to the requests. Upload source documents – the documents
required by the BPO organization can be transferred through the system, and the receiver can
download them. Check progress – clients should be constantly updated with the progress of the
work. Quality check and testing – the clients can check their product and quote any modifications. Upload product/service – BPO organization should upload their product/service for the
further procedure (payment, shipment, etc.). Payment – clients should pay the BPO organization
at the end of their agreement. Shipment – the product/service should be delivered to the clients.
Rating – the clients can rate the service provided by the BPO organization
>>>
